title: Rivi-Anu
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Conflicting|"[[To the Vanishing Point]]"|''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Rivi-Anu.jpg]] |name=Rivi-Anu |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]]{{CWACite|6|To the Vanishing Point}} establishes that the events of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] take place just before and during the events of {{Film|III}}, which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. {{CSWECite|III|102|Rivi-Anu}} confirms that Riv-Anu was on [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]] during her [[Death/Legends|death]] shown in the comic. |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{CWACite|6|To the Vanishing Point}} |gender= |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Red]] |feathers= |eyes=Green |skin=Fair |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|… Master… Rivi-Anu saved us—''"
"''Yes, Eon. Greater love has no being than to lay down their life for a friend.|Eon and Ki-Adi-Mundi, on Rivi-Anu sacrificing herself to save her allies|}} '''Rivi-Anu''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-spanning conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. In the war's [[19 BBY/Legends|final year]], she was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|promoted]] to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and came under the command of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]]. She, Mundi, and the Republic [[Clone trooper/Legends|forces]] under their leadership were dispatched to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]] to attack a Separatist base on the world. During the [[Battle of Mygeeto|ensuing battle]], Rivi-Anu was injured as the Republic forced the Separatists into retreat. However, a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] was disabled and plummeted to the planet's surface, threatening the lives of the Republic [[Trooper/Legends|troops]] on the battlefield. Rivi-Anu implored Mundi to get the forces to safety and used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Telekinesis/Legends|delay]] the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] crash. After her allies were secure, Rivi-Anu lost control over the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], which [[Death/Legends|crushed]] her as the ship finished its descent to the surface. ==Biography== {{Quote|The young Jedi are scared about going into battle, Master.''"
"''Yes. I regret that all of you had not had more training, but you are all worthy of the name Jedi Knight… I would never put you in danger if I did not believe that.|Rivi-Anu and Ki-Adi-Mundi|}} Rivi-Anu, a [[Human/Legends|Human]], was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. She was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Around [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]—a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-wide conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]—Rivi-Anu was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|promoted]] to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], due to the increasing need for Knights in the war. [[File:Ravi-Anu_death.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Rivi-Anu, as the ''Venator''-class Star Destroyer crashes on Mygeeto]] During that same [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Rivi-Anu, along with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Eon]], a [[Unidentified Twi'lek Jedi (Clone Wars)|Twi'lek Jedi]], and a [[Unidentified young Human Jedi|Human Jedi]], was placed under the command of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]]. They were dispatched to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]] during the Republic's [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|sieges]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] to combat forces of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]]. As the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] under Ki-Adi-Mundi's command were preparing to attack a Separatist base on the planet, Rivi-Anu related her fellow Jedi's concerns about the impending battle to Mundi after he finished [[Meditation/Legends|meditating]]. Eventually, Rivi-Anu fought in a [[Battle of Mygeeto|battle]] alongside Ki-Adi-Mundi and her fellow Jedi against the Separatists, causing their enemies to retreat. She was instructed by Mundi to secure the west flank, but as she was preparing to execute the order, she was shot in the right [[Limb/Legends|arm]], losing her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] in the process. At that same moment, a Republic [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] which had been destroyed by Separatist forces plunged down through the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], endangering the forces on the surface. Rivi-Anu did not flee as Mundi ordered his forces to retreat, and elected to stay and attempt to use the Force to [[Telekinesis/Legends|grasp]] the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and hold it off long enough for her allies to reach safety. However, after the Republic [[Troop/Legends|troops]] were successfully secured, Rivi-Anu lost control of the ship, causing it to [[Death/Legends|crush]] her as it crashed on the planet's surface. After the battle, Rivi-Anu's self-sacrifice was noted by Mundi. During his next mission on Mygeeto, the [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] meditated in the [[Water/Legends|rain]] on Rivi-Anu's sacrifice. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|No, Master—go back!! I'll hold back the ship… you save the troops!''"
"''You're not strong enough—''"
"''Go, Master—please…|Rivi-Anu and Ki-Adi-Mundi, as the former prepares to use the Force to delay an inbound Star Destroyer|}} [[File:Ravi-Anu.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Rivi-Anu]] Rivi-Anu was a light-skinned individual who had [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and green [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] with triangular purple [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoo]] under both of her eyes. She was concerned about her young age and status as a Jedi Knight, due to the fact that her training was rushed because of the Republic's increasing need for Jedi Knights, and expressed these concerns to Master Ki-Adi-Mundi while on Mygeeto. Despite these concerns, she was reassured by Mundi that he had faith in her and her fellow Jedi's abilities. During the battle against the Separatists on the planet, she displayed her selflessness by forfeiting her life so that her allies could escape as she used the Force to delay the crash of the crippled Republic [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]. After her death, Mundi noted that her selfless act was a display of great love. ==Powers and abilities== Rivi-Anu was a capable user of telekinetic Force powers, displaying that as she delayed the disabled Star Destroyer's crash from Mygeeto's surface. ==Equipment== Rivi-Anu [[Clothing/Legends|wore]] a set of brown [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi robes]] and used a lightsaber with a green [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]] during the Battle of Mygeeto. ==Behind the scenes== Rivi-Anu was introduced in the short story "[[To the Vanishing Point]]," which was one of four stories compiled in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 6|sixth volume]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]]. That volume was published [[August 16]], [[2006]],{{DarkHorse|url=Books/13-754/Star-Wars-Clone-Wars-Adventures-Vol-6-TPB|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Vol. 6 TPB}} and the character was created and drawn by [[Matthew Fillbach|Matthew]] and [[Shawn Fillbach]]. In "To the Vanishing Point," the battle in which Rivi-Anu perished was implied to have taken place on a different world from Mygeeto. However, [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' later established in Rivi-Anu's entry that the events of the story took place on Mygeeto.{{CSWECite|III|102|Rivi-Anu}} This article assumes the latter to be correct. ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|6|To the Vanishing Point}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|89|Drawn by the Force}} {{Po}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Rivi-Anu}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Rivi-Anu |nl=Rivi-Anu }} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Knights]]
